parameters.responseBody: {"response_type": "ephemeral", "text": "\ud83d\ude4f Got it \u2014 building your episode now. I'll send you a follow-up when it's queued."}

parameters.content:
## Slack App Setup

**1. Create Slack App**
→ https://api.slack.com/apps → "Create New App" → "From scratch"
→ Name: Walk With Me  |  Pick your workspace

**2. Add Slash Command**
→ Slash Commands → Create New Command
→ Command: `/wwm`
→ Request URL: `https://n8n-latest-d2lq.onrender.com/webhook/wwm-slack`
→ Short Description: Submit a devotional seed idea
→ Usage Hint: `[your idea — scripture and emotion optional]`

**3. Install to Workspace**
→ OAuth & Permissions → Install to Workspace

**4. Usage from phone**
Open Slack → any channel or DM → type:
`/wwm Been thinking about what it means to lead when you feel unqualified. Maybe Exodus 4.`
